description: Downsample points to n representative points using Largest-Triangle-Three-Buckets
comment: Sorts input by x before sampling.

description: Alias for lttb with ClickHouse-compatible naming
comment: Sorts input by x before sampling.
example: SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(x, y, 4) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);

description: Downsample already-sorted points to n representative points
comment: Caller must guarantee input is ordered by x.
example: SELECT lttb_sorted(x, y, 4) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);

description: Return selected sorted-position indices from LTTB sampling
example: SELECT lttb_indices(x, y, 4) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);

description: Downsample using MinMax preselection followed by LTTB
comment: Approximate method for large inputs. Pass NULL for the default minmax_ratio.
example: SELECT minmax_lttb(x, y, 4, NULL) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);

description: Downsample already-sorted points using MinMax preselection followed by LTTB
comment: Approximate method for large inputs. Caller must guarantee input is ordered by x.
example: SELECT minmax_lttb_sorted(x, y, 4, NULL) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);

description: Return per-bucket statistical summaries over y with x range boundaries
comment: Returns STRUCT(bucket_start, bucket_end, count, min, max, mean, std, first, last)[].
example: SELECT bucket_stats(x, y, 3) FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 10), (3, -5), (4, 8), (5, 0)) AS t(x, y);
